_readme: Training examples for SetFit classifiers. Edit these and run: python run_pipeline.py retrain

runs small: runs very small, go at least one size up from what you normally wear
the medium fit like a small, definitely size up
much smaller than expected, could not zip it up in my normal size
i'm usually a 6 and had to get an 8, it runs very small
tight across the chest even though i ordered my regular size
snug everywhere, wish i had ordered larger
petite sizing was still too small for my frame
ordered my usual size and it was way too tight
true to size: fits perfectly in my usual size
ordered my normal size and it fits exactly as expected
true to size, no need to go up or down
sizing is accurate, fits just right
bought my usual medium and it fits great
fits exactly like the measurements said it would
consistent with other items from this brand
runs large: way too big, could have easily sized down
fits large, i am swimming in the small
ordered a small and it was very roomy
too loose everywhere, should have gone down a size
the xs fits me like a medium
baggy and oversized even in the smallest size
hung off me like a tent
i usually wear a medium but this was too big

high quality: the fabric is beautiful, thick and well-made
excellent construction, seams are clean and sturdy
fabric feels luxurious and holds its shape
washes well and keeps its shape
high-quality material that does not pill
low quality: the fabric feels cheap and thin
material looks cheap and feels cheap
feels like it will fall apart soon
uncertain: just received it, seems nice but need more time
only worn once, too soon to tell
need more wears before judging quality
brand new, looks fine so far
will update after a few washes

flattering: love how it looks on me
unflattering: does not flatter my body type
different from expectations: not what i expected at all

very comfortable: so comfortable i wear it all day
